ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team playing the match */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team playing the match */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date when the match was played */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season in which the match was played */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue where the match was played */,
  "toss_winner" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the toss */,
  "toss_decide" INTEGER /* Decision made by the toss winner (1: Bat, 2: Bowl) */,
  "win_type" INTEGER /* Type of win (1: Normal, 2: Super Over) */,
  "win_margin" INTEGER /* Margin of win */,
  "outcome_type" INTEGER /* Type of outcome (1: Normal, 2: Abandoned) */,
  "match_winner" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the match */,
  "man_of_the_match" INTEGER /* ID of the player who was awarded the Man of the Match */,
  "match_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match type (e.g., international, domestic) */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league or tournament the match belongs to */,
  "match_version" INTEGER /* Version of the match data */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Status of the match (e.g., scheduled, in progress, completed) */,
  "match_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the match in minutes */,
  "match_attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  "match_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team2_id FOREIGN KEY ("team2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_man_of_the_match FOREIGN KEY ("man_of_the_match") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_match_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_type_id") REFERENCES match_types ("match_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_match_winner FOREIGN KEY ("match_winner") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_code" TEXT /* Abbreviated code for the team */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* Logo of the team */,
  "team_founded" TEXT /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_coach" TEXT /* Name of the team's coach */,
  "team_captain" TEXT /* Name of the team's captain */,
  "team_stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* Team's official website URL */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "player_dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "player_country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the player */,
  "player_position" TEXT /* Player's position (e.g., batsman, bowler) */,
  "player_height" REAL /* Player's height in centimeters */,
  "player_weight" REAL /* Player's weight in kilograms */,
  "player_jersey_number" INTEGER /* Player's jersey number */,
  "player_batting_style" TEXT /* Player's batting style (e.g., right-handed, left-handed) */,
  "player_bowling_style" TEXT /* Player's bowling style (e.g., right-arm fast, left-arm spin) */,
  "player_career_start" TEXT /* Date the player started their professional career */,
  "player_career_end" TEXT /* Date the player ended their professional career (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year in which the season was played */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "season_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "season_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "season_sponsor" TEXT /* Name of the season's sponsor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "venue_city" TEXT /* City where the venue is located */,
  "venue_country" TEXT /* Country where the venue is located */,
  "venue_capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the venue */,
  "venue_type" TEXT /* Type of venue (e.g., stadium, arena) */,
  "venue_elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the venue in meters */,
  "venue_surface" TEXT /* Surface type of the venue (e.g., grass, artificial turf) */,
  "venue_website" TEXT /* Venue's official website URL */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_types" (
  "match_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match type */,
  "match_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the match type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome */,
  "outcome_name" TEXT /* Name of the outcome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "toss_decisions" (
  "toss_decision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each toss decision */,
  "toss_decision_name" TEXT /* Name of the toss decision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("toss_decision_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the match */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the match was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the match */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used by the user (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, administrator) */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "user_avatar" TEXT /* URL of the user's avatar */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
